sentiment.reasoning: A class action lawsuit introduces immediate legal risk and potential financial liability for service disruptions.

headlines.headline: Volval Devices faces class action over precision manufacturing service disruption

headlines.headline: Volval Devices to host investor day focused on data analytics strategy

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
